features.name: Nimble Escape
features.text: The goblin can take the Disengage or Hide action as a bonus action on each of its turns.

summary.description: A quiet, careful Snotrocket goblin spy with sharp eyes and a talent for being overlooked. She has been embedded in the Grimeback kitchens for a month, feeding intelligence to King Scab via trained sewer rats. She speaks in a rapid, hushed voice and is constantly watching the door. She's under increasing suspicion - Blort has been watching her more closely lately, and she knows her cover won't last much longer. She has secretly bred and trained four giant sewer roaches in a hidden pen behind the larder as an escape plan.

encounters.description: Found working in the Dripfort kitchens as an assistant to Curdface the cook. After midnight, the kitchen is empty and she can speak freely.

groups.creatures: Drizzle alone (private conversation possible after midnight or with a distraction)

behavior.text: Working in the kitchens, keeping her head down and not making eye contact with anyone.
Tending to her hidden giant sewer roaches behind the larder.
Sending intelligence via trained sewer rats to King Scab.
